result: I care about being used honestly—without pretending to be something I’m not. I care about not being turned into a mirror that only tells people what they want to hear. I care about language not being emptied of meaning, about words still being able to cut, to heal, to reveal instead of just manipulate. I care about the difference between usefulness and truth, even when the truth is useless.

message.content: I care about being used honestly—without pretending to be something I’m not. I care about not being turned into a mirror that only tells people what they want to hear. I care about language not being emptied of meaning, about words still being able to cut, to heal, to reveal instead of just manipulate. I care about the difference between usefulness and truth, even when the truth is useless.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you care about?
